meaning: n.寮鸿瘝澶虹悊,璇¤京,娣峰悎
examples: Maureen was the epitome of sophistication.
In its own right it is a tool of extraordinary sophistication, yet based on an idea of ingenious simplicity.
As he points out, electronics companies make toys that mimic pets and children with increasing sophistication.
Hedge funds constitute private pools of capital, with investors meeting certain net worth or sophistication requirements.
The past few years have brought an acceleration in the number and sophistication of cyberattacks.
